{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321175755B12EB59A3EA60324577F"}"},"total":235},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7346553344646775577","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我看小说已经四五年了，有些挑剔，这是男主穿越文我最看好的一部小说，没有之一。
最喜欢这种正能量的小说，
没有那种男主穿越的三妻四妾的恶心情节，
走过路过千万不要错过！别错过！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1710505646,"group_id":"7189041197413829644","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N34YCevolPpQHClm8iUQ2QRPi9S551wjVCQDUtUelX+G","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1884994959845959","user_name":"波澜壮阔的珠璃"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1884994959845959","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7189041197413829644","book_info":{"abstract":"荣长煜穿越后，成了一个要钱没钱，要人没人，要势力没势力的窝囊太子。
皇上猜忌，皇子们虎视眈眈，随时要了他的太子之位，甚至他的命。
被退婚，被诬陷，让他的处境更加雪上加霜。
所以，他训练出一支特种部队-东宫侍卫队。
所以，他请最有经验的人帮忙组建一支暗卫队，护卫、暗杀、收集情报，样样行！
所以，他拿出畅销全大陆的商品，跟商界精英合作，赚的盆满钵满！
什么，说我腹中草莽？看我如何之乎者也，虐得你叫爹喊妈！
他上马能打天下，下马能安天下！
还有人敢觊觎太子之位？
皇上和诸位大臣怕了，“太子文武兼备，必是我大燕中兴之主”。
宠女狂魔穆大将军放话出去，“我穆家军誓死效忠未来女婿——太子殿下。”
西北边疆三十万大军主帅喊话，我等誓死追随太子殿下。
大臣们主动要给太子送妃子送美人。
太子：弱水三千我只取一瓢饮。
“夫君可还记得山路之上你救过的一名女子？”洞房花烛夜，娇妻温柔相问，“娘子可记得，一年前你送出的一个大鸡腿？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o2f58b74f2e0c559e40c36f967e43e565~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"北羊南牧","author_id":"","book_id":"7189041197413829644","book_name":"穿越古代，从窝囊废到九五之尊","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1683人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":375,"name":"特种兵","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=375&name=特种兵&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7189041396068647463","read_count":"1683","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"312986"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"145","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,系统,穿越,特种兵,架空","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o2f58b74f2e0c559e40c36f967e43e565~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779271075&x-signature=e7pdPcMx8Bos8nP%2FMTZ6BEqe04s%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"110986257798","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"208"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321175755B12EB59A3EA60324577F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读19
